features.name: gridfinity_base_grid
features.description: 2x1 stepped chamfer base profile for baseplate interlock, with bridge plate connecting the two base units. Profile: 0.8mm chamfer, 1.8mm vertical wall, 2.15mm chamfer.

features.name: bin_body_solid
features.description: Solid outer block from Z=0 to Z=84mm (with 0.01mm overlap into lip zone for watertight mesh). The pocket is the only interior void — no generic rectangular cavity. Pocket walls are 6.75mm (X sides) and 11.75mm (Y sides) of solid material.

features.name: display_body_cavity
features.description: Lower pocket zone: 70x18mm rectangular cavity holding the caliper display body (68x16mm nominal + 1mm clearance/side). Centered in bin XY. 64mm deep from floor (Z=7.2 to Z=71.2).

features.name: pocket_transition_ledge
features.description: Horizontal L-shaped support surface at Z=71.2mm where the display cavity narrows to the beam slot. The 18x7mm beam slot passes through at the min-X, min-Y corner; the remaining 70x18 minus 18x7 area is solid ledge. Caliper display body rests on this ledge, supported on 3 sides.

features.name: beam_slot
features.description: Upper pocket zone: 18x7mm rectangular slot for the caliper beam (16x5mm nominal + 1mm clearance/side). Positioned at min-X, min-Y corner of the display cavity footprint. Extends from Z=71.2 through the stacking lip to Z=88.4 for clean opening.

features.name: stacking_lip
features.description: Standard Gridfinity stacking lip profile (4.4mm tall, 2.6mm depth). 0.7mm catch at 45 deg, 1.8mm vertical, 1.9mm at 45 deg. The beam slot cuts through this lip at one corner.

printOrientation.bed_face: bin base (bottom of Gridfinity base profile)
printOrientation.z_direction: upward from base to stacking lip
